summary: Chat room app with live user count fix: floor count at 1 when inside a room, send immediate heartbeat on join for real count sync, and remove 'online' text from UI. No caller checks to be added to backend.
architectural_notes: Do not add caller checks to the backend when editing it
known_issues: Live user count shows 0 briefly on room join before heartbeat responds (being fixed)

existing_features.title: In ChatArea.tsx, when rendering the live user count inside a chatroom, floor the displayed value at a minimum of 1 whenever the local user is present in the room. This ensures the count never shows 0 while the user is viewing the room.
Remove the word 'online' (or any 'online' label/text) from the live user count display in ChatArea.tsx. The count should display without an 'online' suffix or prefix.

new_feature_requests.summary: Floor live user count at 1 when inside a room and send immediate heartbeat on join

In ChatroomPage.tsx (or useHeartbeat.ts), fire an immediate heartbeat call to the backend as soon as the user joins/enters a room, without waiting for the first 45-second interval tick. This causes the real backend count to sync quickly after join.
